title: Upgraded Pro‑level Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling Headphones, HD Sound & Big Bass, 2X Softer Comfort, Long ANC Playtime, Wireless Over-Ear Bluetooth Headphones Perfect for Home Office|Travel|Pair
description: Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation & Immersive Sound: Engineered by Vonaural, these hybrid active noise cancelling headphones are designed to reduce everyday ambient noise while preserving sound detail and clarity. Our carefully tuned hybrid ANC system works alongside dual high-performance drivers to deliver clear highs, balanced mids, and deep, controlled bass—so you can stay focused and fully immersed whether commuting, working, or unwinding at home Premium Listening Experience & Rich Sound Detail: Enjoy a refined listening experience with Vonaural expertly tuned drivers that deliver crisp highs, clear mids, and deep, punchy bass.Whether you’re listening to music, watching movies, or taking calls, these wireless headphones over ear noise cancelling provide balanced, immersive sound with excellent clarity and detail—bringing your favorite content to life at home, at work, or on the go Clear Calls & Easy Controls: Equipped with built-in microphones and noise reduction technology, Vonaural bluetooth over the ear headphones ensure your voice is captured clearly during hands-free calls and online meetings. Intuitive onboard controls allow you to adjust volume, change tracks, answer calls, and switch noise cancelling modes effortlessly—giving you full control without reaching for your phone All-Day Comfort for Extended Wear: Designed for long listening sessions, Vonaural over-ear Bluetooth headphones feature ultra-soft ear cushions and an adjustable headband that evenly distributes pressure for a comfortable, secure fit. The lightweight design helps reduce fatigue, making them ideal for home office use, long flights, online meetings, and daily wear Long-Lasting Power & Reliable Wireless Performance: Built to keep up with your day, Vonaural noise-canceling headphones wireless offer up to 35 hours of playtime on a single charge. Advanced Bluetooth technology provides a fast, stable connection with low latency and a dependable wireless range—so your music, calls, and videos stay smooth and uninterrupted wherever you go › See more product details
